data.title: US to retract subpoenas issued to NY Times journalists following a Federal judge's criticism, amid claims of press intimidation.
data.description: A federal judge expressed concerns regarding the government's management of the subpoenas, which, according to The Times, were perceived as a move to intimidate the freedom of the press.

data.title: Mattel and Lucha Libre AAA® Announce Worldwide Licensing Partnership
data.description: Mattel, Inc., a renowned global play and family entertainment company, along with WWE, unveiled a fresh multi-year global licensing agreement at a shared San Diego Comic-Con panel. This agreement broadens Mattel's WWE repertoire to encompass Lucha Libre AAA Worldwide (AAA), a highly esteemed lucha libre promotion in Mexico. The newly sealed deal solidifies Mattel as the primary provider of WWE action figures and toys for fans globally. This expanded partnership is set to commence in the fall of 2027.

data.title: Kirin與Blackmores攜手合作，在澳洲和紐西蘭推出含Kirin Group的Cognizin®胞二磷膽鹼的腦功能輔助補充品
data.description: Tokyo - Kirin Holdings Company, Limited (Kirin Holdings) (TOKYO:2503) and Blackmores Limited, a leading natural health company in Australia under the Kirin Group, are pleased to announce the launch of Blackmores Cognition Ultra in Australia and Blackmores Ultra Brain Care in New Zealand. These new supplements feature the scientifically validated ingredient Cognizin® Citicoline provided by Kirin Group's subsidiary Kyowa Hakko Bio Co., Ltd., marking Blackmores' first product aimed at enhancing cognitive performance. Manufactured at Blackmores' production facility in Braeside, the product will be available in New Zealand pharmacies and on Blackmores' Australian e-commerce platform starting in late July, followed by a launch in Australian pharmacies in September. Since Blackmores joined Kirin Group in August 2023, the Group has strengthened measures to meet consumer health needs in the Asia Pacific region and explore value creation opportunities and business synergies in the health science sector.

data.title: BitMEX exit underscores crypto consolidation with rising regulatory costs, market concentration, and licensed trading venues.
data.description: The closure of BitMEX represents the conclusion of one of the pioneering derivative exchanges in the cryptocurrency industry. Analysts attribute this development to increasing regulatory expenses, market consolidation, and the transition towards regulated trading platforms. This event signifies a significant shift in the sector, with BitMEX's shutdown impacting numerous traders and the broader cryptocurrency community.

data.title: ​Arrcus and UfiSpace Deliver a Production-Ready AI Networking Solution for AMD-Powered AI Infrastructure
data.description: Arrcus, a top provider of distributed networking infrastructure, has partnered with UfiSpace, a renowned global firm in open networking solutions. This collaboration involves combining Arrcus' ArcOS® network operating system with UfiSpace's high-speed open switches utilizing Broadcom® silicon technology. The joint offering will be demonstrated at the upcoming AMD Advancing AI Day 2026 event in San Francisco on July 22-23, where GIGABYTE’s AI Cluster, GIGAPOD featuring the AMD EPYC & AMD Instinct platforms will also be featured.

data.title: Conexon Connect Chooses Calix Agent Workforce Cloud To Advance 79 NPS and Scale Their Go-to-Market Strategy
data.description: In San Jose, California, Calix, Inc. (NYSE: CALX) revealed that Conexon Connect, the ISP division of Conexon, a prominent rural fiber broadband company, is utilizing Calix Agent Workforce™ Cloud on the AI-driven Calix One™ platform to expand its presence in residential, commercial, and multi-dwelling unit (MDU) sectors. Beginning their partnership in 2021, Conexon Connect has experienced significant growth, expanding over five years and currently undertaking projects in various locations including Colo.

data.title: Aldebaran and Centauri Minerals finalize $25M subscription receipt financing for Centauri spin-off.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the United States fell to 3.8% in the month of March. This marked a decrease of 0.2% from the previous month. Additionally, the economy added 196,000 jobs, exceeding expectations. The strong job growth was seen in various sectors including healthcare, construction, and professional services. The average hourly earnings also saw an increase of 3.2% from the previous year. Overall, these numbers indicate a robust and growing economy with a healthy labor market.

data.title: Kirin与Blackmores携手合作，在澳大利亚和新西兰推出含Kirin Group的Cognizin®胞磷胆碱的脑功能支持补充剂
data.description: Tokyo—Kirin Holdings Company, Limited (Kirin Holdings)(TOKYO:2503) and its subsidiary, the leading Australian natural health company Blackmores Limited (Blackmores), are pleased to announce the launch of Blackmores Cognition Ultra in Australia and Blackmores Ultra Brain Care in New Zealand. These new supplements incorporate the scientifically validated ingredient Cognizin® phosphatidylcholine provided by Kirin Group's subsidiary Kyowa Hakko Bio Co., Ltd., marking Blackmores' first product aimed at enhancing cognitive performance. Manufactured at Blackmores' production facility in Braeside, the product will be available in New Zealand pharmacies and on Blackmores' e-commerce platform starting in late July, followed by a launch in Australian pharmacies in September. Since Blackmores joined the Kirin Group in August 2023, the group has strengthened initiatives to meet consumer health needs in the Asia-Pacific region while exploring value creation opportunities and business synergies in the health science field.

data.title: Vlad Tenev's X account hacked to promote fake 'Vladhood' token on Robinhood Chain, exploiting memes trend.
data.description: A recent deleted post promoted a fake "Vladhood" token as the symbol of Robinhood Chain. This scam exploited the platform, which is mainly known for memes, as it gains popularity.

data.title: Progyny, Inc. Announces Details for Its Second Quarter 2026 Results Report
data.description: On July 23, 2026, Progyny, Inc. (Nasdaq: PGNY), a prominent company specializing in women’s health and family building services, announced that it will disclose its financial performance for the quarter concluding on June 30, 2026, post the market's closure on Thursday, August 6, 2026.

data.title: Johnson Outdoors to Release Fiscal 2026 Third Quarter Results on August 7, 2026
data.description: RACINE, Wisconsin, July 23, 2026 - Johnson Outdoors Inc. (Nasdaq: JOUT), a prominent global creator of outdoor recreation gear and technology, is set to disclose its financial performance for the Fiscal 2026 third quarter on August 7, 2026, before the market opens. Following the morning release, the Company will conduct a conference call and audio webcast at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time to address the quarterly financial outcomes and deliver a corporate overview.

data.title: University System of Maryland and NASA Sign Five-Year Space Act Agreement to Advance Student Innovation in Space Exploration
data.description: A Space Act Agreement has been made between NASA and the University System of Maryland for a five-year collaboration to promote student-driven innovation in space exploration.

data.title: Schneider Electric and AMD release first Helios platform reference design to accelerate AI Factory deployment
data.description: In a significant development, Schneider Electric and AMD have recently introduced the initial Helios platform reference design. This innovation aims to expedite the deployment of AI Factory solutions. The collaboration between the two tech giants is set to reshape the industry, with the Helios platform offering cutting-edge capabilities for artificial intelligence applications. The first design is projected to revolutionize the sector and is seen as a major step forward in enhancing efficiency and performance. Stay tuned for more updates on this groundbreaking partnership.
